verses.text: Tu-in mi nautang numei leh pasalte in a Jew mipihte uh tungah lungkimlohna kam hong gingsak uh hi
Mi pawlkhatte in an leina dingin a tanute uh leh a tapate uh a piakna thu hong gen uh hi
Pawlkhatte in kial tun' huhau-in an leina dingin a lote, a leenggah lote, leh a innte uh a piakna hong gen uh hi
Pawlkhatte in kumpipa tungah siah piak dingin a lote uh leh a leenggui lote uh khamin a piakna uh hong gen uh hi

Amaute in, “Kote pen ka behte uh mah bangin cilesa kibang hi-in, ka naupangte uh zong amau' naupangte mah bangin a hoih hinapi-in, ka tanute uh leh ka tapate uh sal suak dingin ka phum uh hi. Ka tanute uh pawlkhat zong sal suakkhin a, ka lote uh leh ka leenggui lote uh midangte-a' suakkhin ahih manin amaute tatna dingin ka hih zawh uh bangmah omlo hi,” hong ci uh hi
Amaute' kikona leh hih thute ka zak ciangin ka heh mahmah hi
Kei zong hih thu limtakin ka ngaihsun a, tua ciangin uliante leh thukhente taii-in amaute kiangah, “No leh no leiba manin salin na kila uh hi,” ka ci hi. Amaute nakpi takin taii-in

“Minam dangte tungah sala kizuaksa i Jew mipihte ahizo zahzahin i tanhkik hi. Tua hinapi-in note in na mipihte uh na zuak uh a, tu-in amaute i tatkik ding hi zel hi,” ka ci hi. Amaute pauloin om uh a, a gen ding mel uh theilo uh hi
Tua ciangin keimah in, “Note' gamtatna hoihlo hi. I gal ahi minam dangte' zahkona i ngahlohna dingin i Pasian zahtakna tawh na gamtat ding uh kilawm hi
Kei leh ka behte leh ka nasemte in zong an leh sum leitawi-in ka piakhia uh hi. Leiba manin mi kilakna phiat ni
Tuni mahmahin a lote, a oliv lote, a innte uh leh a meetin na lak uh sum, an, leenggahzu, leh sathaute, amaute tungah pia kik un,” ka ci hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hihte khempeuh ka piakik ding uh a, amaute tung panin bangmah ka kal nawn kei ding uh hi. Na gen bangin ka gamta ding uh hi,” hong ci uh hi. Tua ciangin siampite ka sam a, a ciamsa bangun a gamtatna dingun siampite' mai-ah kiciamna ka bawlsak hi

Tua ciangin kei zong ka puan singin, “Hih thuciamna a tungsak lo peuhmah a inn leh a neihsa panin Pasian in singkhia ta hen. Hih bangin kisingkhia hen la, hawmsuak hen!” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuh in, “Hi ta hen,” ci uh a, Topa a phat uh hi. Tua hi a, a ciamsa bangun mite a gamta uh hi

Tua thamloin, Judah gam a uk dingin hong kiseh huna kipan, Kumpi Artakzaksis' kum sawmnihna pan a kum sawmthumlenihna dong, kum sawmlenih sung, kei leh ka behte in gam ukte' ngah ngei ante ka ne kei uh hi

Keima hun ma-in a ukte in mite tungah van gikpi suan uh a, amaute' tung panin nisimin an leh leenggahzu ngun shekel sawmli man a la uh hi. Amau' nasemte nangawn mite tungah kiliansak lai uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian ka zahtakna hangin tua bangin kei ka gamta kei hi
Hih kulh cian'na-ah keimahmah in zong ka sem a, kei-a' dingin leitang bangmah ka la kei hi. Keima mite khempeuh nasem ding bekin tua lai-ah kisutuah uh hi
Kiim leh pama minam dangte' kiang pan hong paite banah, nisimin ka sabuai-ah an a ne, thukhente leh Jew mi a kihelin leengla za leh sawmnga bang ka nei den hi

Nisimin innsung annektawm dinga kibawl bawngtal khat leh tuu limci guk ahi hi. Tua mah bangin ak zong kibawl a, ni sawm simin leenggahzu a um tampipi-in kihih hi. Tua zahin bei ta se leh gam ukte' ngah theih ahi an leh tui ka kal kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mite genthei lua hi
Pasian aw, hih mite-a' dingin ka bawlna khempeuh kei-a' dingin a hoih lamin hong phawk in.
